dict.string: Copyright © 2026 AVA Digital LLC. All rights reserved.
CODEC uses the microphone for voice commands, dictation, and the "Hey CODEC" wake word. Audio is transcribed locally and never leaves your Mac.
CODEC controls apps like Messages, Notes, Reminders, and Music on your behalf when you ask it to. You approve each app individually.
CODEC reads what's on your screen only when you ask it to (e.g. "check my screen"). Screenshots are processed locally for text recognition and never uploaded.
CODEC reads and writes files on your Desktop when a task or skill you run needs to.
CODEC reads and writes files in your Documents folder when a task or skill you run needs to.
CODEC reads and writes files in your Downloads folder when a task or skill you run needs to.
